summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.ui; import org.eclipse.swt.SWT; import org.eclipse.swt.SWTError; import org.eclipse.swt.ole.win32.OleClientSite; import org.eclipse.swt.ole.win32.OleFrame; import org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite; import org.eclipse.ui.part.ViewPart; public class Excel extends ViewPart { public static final String ID = "ExcelTest.view"; private OleClientSite site; public Excel() { } @Override public void createPartControl(Composite parent) { try { OleFrame frame = new OleFrame(parent, SWT.NONE); site = new OleClientSite(frame, SWT.NONE, "Excel.Sheet"); } catch (SWTError e) { System.out.println("Unable to open activeX control"); return;
